injury_filter.description: Excludes weeks a player's snap share cratered to under a quarter of their own peak (a proxy for playing hurt/limited, since no injury-report data is loaded).

snap_share.label: Snap Share
snap_share.description: Share of offensive snaps played, last 4 weeks vs. the 4 weeks before that. Only players currently above 50% snap share. Excludes weeks a player's snap share cratered to under a quarter of their own peak (a proxy for playing hurt/limited, since no injury-report data is loaded).

target_share.label: Target Share
target_share.description: Share of team targets, last 4 weeks vs. the 4 weeks before that. Excludes weeks a player's snap share cratered to under a quarter of their own peak (a proxy for playing hurt/limited, since no injury-report data is loaded).

wopr.label: WOPR (Opportunity Score)
wopr.description: Weighted Opportunity Rating — combines target share and air yards share into one usage score. Last 4 weeks vs. the 4 weeks before that. Excludes weeks a player's snap share cratered to under a quarter of their own peak (a proxy for playing hurt/limited, since no injury-report data is loaded).

yards_per_target.label: Yards / Target
yards_per_target.description: Receiving yards per target — the closest proxy Sleeper's free data supports for yards-per-route-run efficiency (routes-run charting isn't publicly available). Min. 3 targets/week in the recent window. Excludes weeks a player's snap share cratered to under a quarter of their own peak (a proxy for playing hurt/limited, since no injury-report data is loaded).

yards_per_carry.label: Yards / Carry
yards_per_carry.description: Rushing yards per carry. Min. 3 carries/week in the recent window. Excludes weeks a player's snap share cratered to under a quarter of their own peak (a proxy for playing hurt/limited, since no injury-report data is loaded).

yards_per_attempt.label: Yards / Attempt
yards_per_attempt.description: Passing yards per attempt. Min. 10 attempts/week in the recent window. Excludes weeks a player's snap share cratered to under a quarter of their own peak (a proxy for playing hurt/limited, since no injury-report data is loaded).

passing_epa.label: Passing EPA / Attempt
passing_epa.description: Expected Points Added per pass attempt — a play-by-play efficiency metric that accounts for down, distance, and situation. Min. 10 attempts/week in the recent window. Excludes weeks a player's snap share cratered to under a quarter of their own peak (a proxy for playing hurt/limited, since no injury-report data is loaded).

cpoe.label: CPOE
cpoe.description: Completion % Over Expected — passing accuracy adjusted for throw difficulty, independent of scheme or receiver play. Min. 10 attempts/week in the recent window. Excludes weeks a player's snap share cratered to under a quarter of their own peak (a proxy for playing hurt/limited, since no injury-report data is loaded).

air_yards_share.label: Air Yards Share
air_yards_share.description: Share of the team's total air yards (downfield distance thrown, not yards after catch) — a signal of a growing vertical/red-zone role. Min. 3 targets/week in the recent window. Excludes weeks a player's snap share cratered to under a quarter of their own peak (a proxy for playing hurt/limited, since no injury-report data is loaded).
